name: UNITED, Inc.
summary: UNITED, Inc. engages in the ad-technology, content, and investment businesses in Japan. It offers Bypass, adstir, and Crash Fever ad technology services. The company also operates CHEERZ, a service to help artists activities; produces sports-related websites; plans and develops media; plans and operates gift sites; plans, develops, and operates TechAcademy, a Japan's online programming school; and provides consulting solutions to support digital transformation of companies. It is also involved in the venture capital investment business. UNITED, Inc. was founded in 1998 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
